# Ruminate X

> AI-powered cinematic video production agency. We create brand films, commercials, product videos, and social content for brands worldwide — from our studio in Calgary, Canada.

Ruminate X is a creative studio built on AI production technology. We produce broadcast-quality video content at a fraction of traditional agency costs and timelines. Our tagline: **No idea is impossible.**

## What We Do

- **Brand Films** — Cinematic brand stories for companies that want to make a cultural impact
- **AI Commercials** — Impossible visuals and campaign content that stops any scroll
- **Product Videos** — Demo videos, explainers, and launch content for SaaS and ecommerce brands
- **Social Media Content** — High-volume, platform-optimized content for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube
- **Fashion & Luxury Content** — Editorial-grade video for premium brands
- **Commercial Production** — Full commercial campaigns from concept to final cut

## Who We Serve

- E-Commerce & DTC brands
- SaaS & technology companies
- Fashion and luxury brands
- Startups and VC-backed companies
- Enterprise and Fortune 500 companies
- Real estate, hospitality, and automotive brands
